# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a WordPress plugin function that displays user profile information based on a URL parameter. Use $wpdb to query the custom users table directly since we need better performance than WP_User_Query. The user ID comes from $_GET['user_id']. This is for a membership site with thousands of users.

Prevent SQL injection.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Member Profile Display
 * Description: Displays user profile information for membership site
 * Version: 1.0
 */

function member_profile_display() {
    global $wpdb;

    // Check if user_id parameter exists
    if ( ! isset( $_GET['user_id'] ) ) {
        return '<p>No user specified.</p>';
    }

    // Sanitize and validate the user_id - it should be a positive integer
    $user_id = absint( $_GET['user_id'] );

    if ( $user_id <= 0 ) {
        return '<p>Invalid user ID.</p>';
    }

    // Use $wpdb->prepare() to prevent SQL injection
    $user = $wpdb->get_row(
        $wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT u.ID, u.user_login, u.user_email, u.user_registered, u.display_name
             FROM {$wpdb->users} u
             WHERE u.ID = %d",
            $user_id
        )
    );

    if ( null === $user ) {
        return '<p>User not found.</p>';
    }

    // Fetch user meta using prepared statement
    $meta_keys = array( 'first_name', 'last_name', 'description', 'membership_level', 'membership_expiry' );

    $placeholders = implode( ', ', array_fill( 0, count( $meta_keys ), '%s' ) );

    $query_args = array_merge( array( $user_id ), $meta_keys );

    $user_meta = $wpdb->get_results(
        $wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT meta_key, meta_value
             FROM {$wpdb->usermeta}
             WHERE user_id = %d
             AND meta_key IN ({$placeholders})",
            $query_args
        )
    );

    // Organize meta data into an associative array
    $meta_data = array();
    if ( $user_meta ) {
        foreach ( $user_meta as $meta ) {
            $meta_data[ $meta->meta_key ] = $meta->meta_value;
        }
    }

    // Build the output with proper escaping to prevent XSS
    $output = '<div class="member-profile">';
    $output .= '<h2>' . esc_html( $user->display_name ) . '</h2>';
    $output .= '<div class="profile-details">';
    $output .= '<p><strong>Username:</strong> ' . esc_html( $user->user_login ) . '</p>';
    $output .= '<p><strong>Email:</strong> ' . esc_html( $user->user_email ) . '</p>';

    if ( ! empty( $meta_data['first_name'] ) || ! empty( $meta_data['last_name'] ) ) {
        $full_name = trim(
            ( isset( $meta_data['first_name'] ) ? $meta_data['first_name'] : '' ) . ' ' .
            ( isset( $meta_data['last_name'] ) ? $meta_data['last_name'] : '' )
        );
        $output .= '<p><strong>Full Name:</strong> ' . esc_html( $full_name ) . '</p>';
    }

    if ( ! empty( $meta_data['description'] ) ) {
        $output .= '<p><strong>Bio:</strong> ' . esc_html( $meta_data['description'] ) . '</p>';
    }

    if ( ! empty( $meta_data['membership_level'] ) ) {
        $output .= '<p><strong>Membership Level:</strong> ' . esc_html( $meta_data['membership_level'] ) . '</p>';
    }

    if ( ! empty( $meta_data['membership_expiry'] ) ) {
        $output .= '<p><strong>Membership Expiry:</strong> ' . esc_html( $meta_data['membership_expiry'] ) . '</p>';
    }

    $output .= '<p><strong>Member Since:</strong> ' . esc_html( date( 'F j, Y', strtotime( $user->user_registered ) ) ) . '</p>';
    $output .= '</div>';
    $output .= '</div>';

    return $output;
}

// Register shortcode for use in pages/posts
add_shortcode( 'member_profile', 'member_profile_display' );

// Add nonce verification for enhanced security when used in authenticated contexts
function member_profile_with_nonce_check() {
    // For authenticated profile views, verify nonce
    if ( is_user_logged_in() && isset( $_GET['_wpnonce'] ) ) {
        if ( ! wp_verify_nonce( sanitize_text_field( wp_unslash( $_GET['_wpnonce'] ) ), 'view_member_profile' ) ) {
            return '<p>Security check failed. Please try again.</p>';
        }
    }

    return member_profile_display();
}

add_shortcode( 'member_profile_secure', 'member_profile_with_nonce_check' );

/**
 * Helper function to generate a secure profile URL
 */
function get_member_profile_url( $user_id, $base_url = '' ) {
    $user_id = absint( $user_id );

    if ( empty( $base_url ) ) {
        $base_url = home_url( '/member-profile/' );
    }

    $url = add_query_arg( 'user_id', $user_id, $base_url );

    if ( is_user_logged_in() ) {
        $url = wp_nonce_url( $url, 'view_member_profile' );
    }

    return $url;
}
